page_identity.title: BILLY bookcase, white, 311/2x11x791/2"  - IKEA
page_identity.meta_description: BILLY bookcase, white, 311/2x11x791/2" BILLY bookcase is a beloved icon that never goes out of style. Thanks to its versatility you can use it in many different ways at home – regardless of whether you store books or everyday items in it. Adjustable shelves can be arranged according to your needs.
